tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: Six-Year-Old's Chores for Elderly Neighbor Bloom Into Handmade Friendship
stories.summary: Six-year-old Luke Scott earned money doing chores for elderly neighbor Helen Williams, then surprised her with a Star Wars-themed pillow he sewed himself.

stories.headline: Dodgers Catcher Reaches the Majors as Family Members Are Found After Earthquakes
stories.summary: Dodgers catcher Eliezer Alfonzo played his major league debut on the same day his teenage sister and stepmother were found alive after Venezuela's earthquakes.

stories.headline: Montana's 'Responsible Rider' Campaign Rewards Safe Choices With Surprise Gift Cards
stories.summary: Montana's Barfairies leave $5 coffee gift cards under windshield wipers of vehicles left at bars—rewarding patrons who chose cabs over drunk driving.

stories.headline: Three Elderly Friends Turn 155,000 Bottle Deposits Into Community Care
stories.summary: Three elderly friends—Walter Wilson, Pete Petty, and Monty Wilson—turned 155,000 bottle deposits into donations for libraries, schools, and fire protection along Oregon's McKenzie River.

stories.headline: Spoonbills Surge from Dozens to Thousands as City and Nature Thrive Together
stories.summary: South Korea's black-faced spoonbills surged from 430 to 7,081 birds, with 3,828 now nesting in Incheon, making the city the vital heart of the species' survival.

stories.headline: Community Teamwork Frees Humpback Whale Tangled in 800-Pound Crab Pots
stories.summary: A juvenile humpback whale tangled in two 800-pound Tanner crab pots near Juneau swam free after mariners reported the sighting, triggering a rapid rescue.

stories.headline: Artificial Pancreas Gives Type 1 Diabetics Their Lives Back—and Closes Healthcare Gaps
stories.summary: The UK's National Health Service rolled out the world's first artificial pancreas to type 1 diabetics, improving blood sugar control while closing healthcare gaps across different communities.

stories.headline: Argentina's Messi Leads Stunning Comeback from 2–0 Down in World Cup Thriller
stories.summary: With eleven minutes left, Argentina claws back from two goals down to win 3–2 and advance, with Messi setting records and Fernandez delivering a stoppage-time miracle.

stories.headline: Generous Donor Helps Retired Veteran Rebuild After Fire Destroys His Home
stories.summary: Unable to extract sufficient article details from provided excerpt.

stories.headline: Costa Rica Welcomes Back White-Lipped Peccaries to Reclaimed Forest Home
stories.summary: Researchers relocated 13 white-lipped peccaries to Costa Rica's Piedras Blancas National Park, restoring the species after years of absence using GPS collars and careful acclimation.

stories.headline: India's Mobile 'Liquid Tree' Scrubs Air While Offering Seats and Phone Charging
stories.summary: India's first mobile Smart Algal Liquid Tree absorbs carbon dioxide and releases oxygen in crowded urban spaces, offering seating and phone charging alongside clean air.

stories.headline: Fisherman's Compassion Saves Endangered Pangolin, Released Same Day
stories.summary: A quick-thinking fisherman freed an endangered pangolin from a net and called authorities, reuniting it with Palawan's forests by day's end.

stories.headline: Young Catcher's Replay Challenge and Walk-Off Single Deliver Dodgers' 60th Win
stories.summary: Dalton Rushing became the unlikely hero by urging a replay review and then delivering the walk-off single in an 11-inning thriller.

stories.headline: SpaceX Launches First Commercial Nuclear-Powered Satellite
stories.summary: A tiny tritium-powered CubeSat proves private spacecraft can safely harness nuclear micropower to explore dark, cold regions of space.
